content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Completed the bead 9ni.5.8 remediation by carrying the milestone-aware alias matcher all the way through `project create-from-bead`. The `load_bead_detail` path now retries qualified/short dotted bead refs via `bead_show_query_candidates`, matches `br show` results with `milestone_bead_refs_match` instead of exact dotted-string equality, and keeps `ensure_bead_belongs_to_milestone` aligned with the same milestone-aware alias logic so numeric short dotted aliases are accepted when they resolve to the selected milestone. The existing ID-first milestone-plan binding, legacy title-only fallback warning behavior, and `--flow` membership guard remain intact, and regression coverage now exercises both short dotted and numeric short dotted aliases end to end from the CLI entry path.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the create-from-bead bead lookup path, milestone bead-ref helpers, and existing regressions to confirm where dotted aliases were still gated by exact string checks.
2. [Completed] Propagate milestone-aware alias matching through `load_bead_detail`, `br show` result selection, and milestone membership validation so short dotted aliases and numeric short dotted aliases resolve end to end.
3. [Completed] Add regression coverage for the retry/query path and CLI create-from-bead flows that use short dotted aliases against qualified stored bead IDs.
4. [Completed] Run targeted regressions plus the required repository validation gates, including `nix build`, to verify the alias remediation and the broader bead-plan binding changes.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub load_bead_detail_retries_canonical_show_for_short_dotted_aliases -- --nocapture` succeeded.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_accepts_short_dotted_alias_and_retries_canonical_show -- --nocapture` succeeded.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_accepts_numeric_short_dotted_alias -- --nocapture` succeeded.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` succeeded.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` succeeded.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` succeeded: lib tests `1214 passed` with `6 ignored`, CLI tests `370 passed` with `3 ignored`, `run_attach_tmux` tests `1 passed`, unit tests `1079 passed` with `1 ignored`, doc tests clean with `9 ignored`.
- `nix build` succeeded.

## Outstanding Risks

- Unrelated live orchestration-state changes under `.ralph-burning/` remain in the worktree and were excluded from review per instructions.
